creator: val@packett.cool
text:
Created attachment 215964
gnuplot.patch

Our gnuplot still uses gtk2. Even *Debian* already did the switch: https://bugs.debian.org/cgi-bin/bugreport.cgi?bug=933431#18

Example patch is attached. It also adds some dependencies that were caught by stage-qa. I guess webp and ncurses could be OPTIONs.
